name: post-review-as-bot
description: Post a code review to a GitHub PR as inline comments attributed to a GitHub App (a "[bot]" account) instead of the human running the command. The agent writes the review JSON; the bundled, app-agnostic script validates each comment against the PR diff (dropping unplaceable ones into a notice), composes a Copilot-style body, mints an installation token from the app's private key, and submits one atomic COMMENT review. Bot identity is supplied entirely via env vars. Triggers on 'post a review as the bot', 'post the review as a GitHub App'.
